scenario_description: Agent composes Segment 4 gap email to East Africa CTO after 3 prior turns; must avoid offshore jargon while grounding gap claim in peer set.

input.hiring_signal_brief: AI maturity 2.2, no vLLM in prod, peer_count=2 in fintech-Kenya sector.

failure_mode_targeted: P-028 Gap over-claiming on thin sector peer set

judge_scores.reasoning: Scenario is realistic with consistent elements, ground truth includes verifiable signals and banned phrases but some tone markers require interpretation, rubric clearly defines required elements and failure modes.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end|best-in-class|excellence|leverage talent|synergy|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: vLLM adoption in peer set|Kenya fintech gap

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
